objective: Preserve a bounded recurrence relaunch pack without turning memo into runtime policy.
core_question: Which memo-side surfaces should support recurrence relaunch across the current AoA layers?
current_thesis: Checkpoint continuity plus explicit anchors is enough for honest relaunch at the memo layer.
axis_summary: Use inquiry checkpoint, working recall, and bounded exported state instead of raw continuity.
resolved_decisions: Keep recurrence support inside existing memo surfaces.
Do not add a new memory-object family for return.
open_questions: Which neighboring layer should consume memo-side return anchors first?
next_tests: Validate checkpoint relaunch from bounded anchor refs only.
Verify object-facing working recall remains enough for compact re-entry.

return_pack.reentry_note: Resume from the last valid checkpoint, inspect compact object-facing anchors, then continue with bounded working recall.
